description: Restaurant promotion showcasing Chinese cuisine dishes with location tagging and food photography featuring signature items and appetizers.
structural_recipe: 1) Lead with restaurant name in Arabic 2) Include exact location via emoji and venue name 3) Credit photographer with @ mention 4) Organize content by meal category (appetizers, main dishes) 5) List specific dishes in English with local variations 6) Use bullet points for clarity 7) Tag location in post metadata
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value transparency in dining experiences; location tagging drives foot traffic and dine-in conversions. English dish names signal international/premium positioning while Arabic branding maintains local authenticity. Photographer credit builds community trust and encourages user-generated content sharing.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure alcohol-free menu alignment with Saudi regulations
Verify halal certification if not locally established
Avoid pork-based dishes or clearly mark alternatives
Maintain professional food photography standards expected in Saudi F&B market
cultural_constraints: Must comply with Saudi halal requirements
Avoid depicting gender-mixed dining without context
Location must be in approved/licensed venues
